title: Wrong constraint in error message when delete prohibited due to foreign key
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE parent_table (id Int32 NOT NULL, name String, PRIMARY KEY (id));
CREATE TABLE child_table (id Int32 NOT NULL, parent_id Int32 NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES parent_table (id));
key_bug_features: Deleting from parent table with existing foreign key reference
